forkAttempt.message: The readback did not create a fork or PR because the public fork adversarial test needs an explicit alternate namespace selected for cleanup ownership.

blocker.message: GitHub cannot create a same-owner fork for the authenticated user, and no alternate organization namespace is available.
blocker.requiredFollowUp: Provide a second GitHub user or organization namespace that can fork Ancienttwo/arch-context, open a cross-repository PR, allow readback cleanup, and expose no secrets to fork code.
